calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants BBK Trucking, LLC or Anase Enterprises, LLC.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendants Beth Winter and Everett Winter, and the Third and Fourth Causes of Action, was filed on April 20, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Anase Enterprises, LLC on April 15, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant BBK Trucking, LLC on April 16, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 16, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants BBK Trucking, LLC and Anase Enterprises, LLC as follows:

As to Defendant BBK Trucking, LLC:

Damages/Principal - $447,060.14.
Prejudgment Interest - $14,629.86.
Attorney Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $400.00, for a total judgment as to BBK Trucking, LLC in the amount of $464,590.00.

As to Defendant Anase Enterprises, LLC:

Damages - $263,590.22.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,594.18.
Attorney Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $375.00, for a total judgment as to Anase Enterprises, LLC in the amount of $275,059.40.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraphs 3 & 5 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
